assignments.name: Assign_Update_to_rcdUpdateRiskRegister
assignments.label: Assign Update to rcdUpdateRiskRegister and rcdBeforeUpdate

decisions.name: Check_if_any_Actions_still_open
decisions.label: Check if any Actions still open

decisions.name: Check_if_any_Actions_to_Create
decisions.label: Check if any Actions to Create

formulas.name: fla_CategoryOtherHTMLCheck
formulas.expression:
IF( AND( FIND("<", {!f_co}) > 0, FIND(">", {!f_co}, FIND("<", {!f_co})) > FIND("<", {!f_co}), OR( CONTAINS({!f_co},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_co},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_co},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_co},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_co},"

formulas.name: fla_RiskCategoryIsValidText
formulas.expression:
IF( AND( FIND("<", {!f_co}) > 0, FIND(">", {!f_co}, FIND("<", {!f_co})) > FIND("<", {!f_co}), OR( LEN({!Risk_Category_Other_if_applicable}) <= 10000), OR( CONTAINS({!f_co},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_co},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_co},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_co},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_co},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_co},"

"), CONTAINS({!f_co},"

"), CONTAINS({!f_co},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_co},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_co},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_co},"

fields.name: Confirmation_message
fields.fieldText:
Risk Register ID: {!Get_New_Risk_Register_Id.Name}


Your Risk or Issue case has been created successfully and has been added to the funding award: {!Get_Award.Name}.

fields.name: Edit_Confirmation_Heading
fields.fieldText:
Risk Register ID: {!rcdUpdateRiskRegister.Name}


Your Risk or Issue case has been successfully updated for the funding award: {!Get_Award.Name}.

fields.name: CreateNewReports_text
fields.fieldText: Would you like to create any new Risk Register records for this month?

fields.name: Adhoc_Create_Confirmation_heading
fields.fieldText:
Risk Register ID: {!Get_New_Risk_Register_Id.Name}


Your Risk or Issue case has been created successfully and has been added to the funding award: {!Get_Award.Name}.

fields.name: AdhocEdit_Confirmation_message
fields.fieldText:
Risk Register ID: {!rcdUpdateRiskRegister.Name}


Your Risk or Issue case has been successfully updated for the funding award: {!Get_Award.Name}.

fields.name: Create_Actions_Header
fields.fieldText:
Add Actions to Risks and Issues Record

{!Get_Award.Name}

fields.name: Risks_and_Issues_Case_Header
fields.fieldText:
Create Risks and Issues Record

{!Get_Award.Name}

fields.name: Edit_Risk_Heading
fields.fieldText:
Edit Risk and Issues - Risk ID: {!rcdUpdateRiskRegister.Name}

﻿{!Get_Award.Name}

fields.name: Risks_and_Issues_Case_body
fields.fieldText:
Please enter details of any risks or issues related to this award. This information will help us monitor potential challenges and take appropriate actions to address them effectively.


Fields marked with an asterisk (*) are required. Please ensure all required fields are completed before submitting the form.

fields.name: Risk_Category
fields.helpText: Please Select a value for the risk category being reported.

validationRule.errorMessage: Text must be 10,000 characters or fewer and HTML is not allowed.

fields.name: Risk_Reporting_Period_Start_Date
fields.fieldText: Risk Reporting Period Start Date (* Required)

validationRule.errorMessage: The Risk Reporting Period Start Date only allows dates up to and including today and cannot be more than 1 year before today.

fields.name: Risk_Warning_Message
fields.fieldText:
Risk Status

Risk status cannot be updated as there are open actions linked to this Risk

fields.name: Risk_Description
fields.helpText: Please provide a description of the risk or Issue being reported.

validationRule.errorMessage: Field does not support HTML tags - please remove these and try again.
Field does not support HTML tags - please remove these and try again.
Field does not support HTML tags - please remove these and try again.

fields.name: Likelihood
fields.helpText: The likelihood of the risk materialising, as per the scoring matrix.

fields.name: Impact
fields.helpText: The risk's impact, as per the scoring matrix

fields.name: Contingency_Plans
fields.helpText: What will be done if this risk materialises?

validationRule.errorMessage: Field does not support HTML tags - please remove these and try again.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Risks_and_Issues_Case_Header
fields.fieldText:
Create Risk Register Record

{!Get_Award.Name}

fields.name: Summary_of_Risks_and_Issues_Case_body
fields.fieldText:
Summary of Fraud and Error Record (Read Only)


The following details are a read only summary of the risks register record related to this award.


﻿This information will help us monitor potential challenges and take appropriate actions to address them effectively.

fields.name: Risk_Description_summary
fields.helpText: Please provide a description of the risk or Issue being reported.

validationRule.errorMessage: Field does not support HTML tags - please remove these and try again.
Field does not support HTML tags - please remove these and try again.
Field does not support HTML tags - please remove these and try again.

fields.name: Contingency_Plans_summary
fields.helpText: What will be done if this risk materialises?

validationRule.errorMessage: Field does not support HTML tags - please remove these and try again.

fields.name: Edit_Risks_and_Issues_Case_Header
fields.fieldText:
Edit Risk Register Record ID: {!rcdUpdateRiskRegister.Name}

{!Get_Award.Name}

fields.name: Edit_Summary_of_Risks_and_Issues_Case_body
fields.fieldText:
Summary of Edited Risk Register Record (Read Only)


The following details are a read only summary of the risk register record that has been edited related to this award.


﻿This information will help us monitor potential challenges and take appropriate actions to address them effectively.

fields.name: Edit_Summary_of_Risk_Register_Details
fields.fieldText: Risk Register Details (Before and after edit)

fields.name: Risk_Reporting_Period_Start_Date_Before_Edit
fields.fieldText: Risk Reporting Period Start Date (Before Edit)

fields.name: Edit_Risk_Reporting_Period_Start_Date_Summary
fields.fieldText: Risk Reporting Period Start Date (After Edit)

fields.name: Edit_Risk_Description_summary
fields.helpText: Please provide a description of the risk or Issue being reported.

validationRule.errorMessage: Field does not support HTML tags - please remove these and try again.

fields.name: Edit_Summary_of_Cause_and_Effect
fields.fieldText: Cause and Effect (Before and after edit)

validationRule.errorMessage: Field does not support HTML tags - please remove these and try again.
Field does not support HTML tags - please remove these and try again.

fields.name: Edit_Summary_of_Likelihood_and_Impact
fields.fieldText: Likelihood and Impact (Before and after edit)

fields.name: Edit_Contingency_Plans_summary
fields.helpText: What will be done if this risk materialises?

validationRule.errorMessage: Field does not support HTML tags - please remove these and try again.
